mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO c_code ( id, category, code, `describe`, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id},
'CATEGORY',
#{category},
#{code},#{describe},#{createBy},#{createTime},#{updateBy},#{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE c_code SET category = #{category}, code = #{code}, `describe` = #{describe}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from c_code
category=#{category}
category='category'
order by update_time desc
